park_name: Glasshouse Mountains Caravan and Camping Park

reviews.review_text:
Fantastic location, peaceful and great for our dogs. Very accommodating host, clean facilities.
Highly recommend
Good to deal with, very basic sight, 2 toilets, 2 basins, non drinkable water. Good for a night.
Good clean basic parking area. Cannot drink the water unfortunately. It's clean and safe and growing slowly, so might be better next time.

The best camping in caravaning campground quiet
And very peaceful, beautiful setting hot water showers powered sites I highly recommended this Campground One of the best campgrounds in the Sunshine Coast
The host is so welcoming and friendly! Facilities are nice and very clean. Beautiful view of Mount Ngungun from the campsite.

Schöner kleiner privater Campingplatz , idealer Ausgangspunkt für Wanderungen in den Glashouse Mountains.
Wir waren nach unserer Wohnmobil Übernahme in Brisbane— Maui Camper-auf diesem Platz ( ca 1,5 Std. Von Brisbane entfernt).Am Wochenende ist es ausgesprochen ruhig und angenehm hier. Der Platz ist zwar etwas aus der Zeit gefallen, aber alle Sanitär Bereiche sind sauber und gepflegt.
In der Woche kann es etwas lauter sein, bedingt durch den Verkehr — Heidelberg Quarry/ Sfeinbruch.
Für den Campingstart nahe ein gutes erstes Ziel .

Ian was an absolute legend. Super easy to communicate with and really accommodating. I came with a camper van and had a friend arriving later than planned, and he still made sure we were both sorted. Really enjoyed the stay, would happily return.

Vi ankom sent til campingpladsen og værten tog imod os og viste os på plads.|Det er en meget spartansk plads på et stykke græs som ligger i regnskoven.|Det koster 100 AUD for pladsen 4 mennesker og adgang til strøm, toilet og bad.|Der er intet andet på pladsen..!|Vi kunne ikke finde et sted at tømme vores skrald eller vores campingtoilet.|Vi så ikke mere til vores vært inden vi kørte fra pladsen ved 10 tiden.|Pladsen er ikke særligt pæn og der er flere huller og jordbunker nogle steder.|Jeg synes at omgivelserne med skoven er fantastisk.

Clean tidy and safe. Beatifull environment around.
Highly recommend. I will be returning.

Ian met us with a smile and was so accommodating, he went out of his way to make sure we had everything we needed from water to power to lighting a camp fire. We couldn't have asked for better service, great view to the mountains, green grass and concrete pads to pull up next to. Thanks Ian for making us feel so welcome :)
Super friendly, Ian was so welcoming and was happy to offer any assistance. He lit a camp fire for camp guests to enjoy, and went above and beyond to make our stay perfect. Thank you!

Camping simple avec de  grands espaces ,   nous avons aimé  l'accueil  du propriétaire  et son chien qui le soir a allumé un grand brasero  ou tout le monde  peut se retrouver.  Un vrai moment de partage sous un ciel étoilés.   C'est un vrai plus.  Ici c'est  le retour  à  la simplicité. Les douches +Toilette  sont très propres et c'est proche  de glass house.

Spent 2 nights here. Lovely, peaceful grounds with lots of space. Lots of different bird life that put on a beautiful sunrise chorus. Though amenities are older, they are spotlessly clean with hot, good pressure showers. Ian, the manager, is extremely friendly and helpful and keeps the grounds in very neat and tidy condition. His offsider, Kenda, was a beautiful, happy, friendly bonus to our stay 🐶

Aaagh.... tis a great spot to be sure, if only to unwind and explore the area for treasure! The manager be a good young fellow, who be the life of the park to be sure, with much a knowledge of what's good for ye land lubber.

Clean amenities, close to local attractions and hiking trails, with a quiet friendly atmophere. What the park may lack in modernity, it makes up for with its tranquility, greenery and great big fire pits which are a treat. The park manager Ian, is a polite and considerate young man with a good knowledge of the surrounding area.

Nice place to stay, close to local walks and township. Very friendly and helpful. Nice quiet campground, plenty of space. Clean grounds and amenities, good water pressure in the shower. Laid back and relaxing stay. Very thankful to management. We will be back
Wunderschöner kleiner Campingplatz, ruhig gelegen, alles sauber und gepflegt, sowohl Stellplätze als auch die Sanitäranlagen!
An absolute Hidden gem,|Management went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable the amenities were also meticulously clean and the park grounds were also very well maintained,
Ian's a great host full of information about sights to see around the glass house mountains, the location is awesome with a stunning view of Mount Tibrogogan.

Amazing location with stunning views and useful facilities as well, warm showers and flushing toilets. Unfortunately I did wait a little while to be checked in and when calling the number no one picked up. Ian was very friendly and welcoming!
Thank you

Camping was great
Amenities were good and clean and disability friendly
Staff and owner extremely accommodating
We will be back as our base for more adventures
Ian (care taker) and the owner are great people
Nice quiet and safe park
Wildlife is amazing at night

A beautiful and peaceful spot surrounded by nature. The park is clean, quiet, and well maintained — perfect for a relaxing stay. Facilities are solid, with clean toilets, hot showers, and plenty of drinking water available. The communal fireplace is a great touch for evenings, bringing everyone together under the stars. A lovely place to unwind and enjoy the Glass House Mountains scenery.

Great place good shower clean bathroom good hot water. Quiet place no parties no load music. Fantastic location for 4wd people close to all tracks. Owner is one of the best blokes I've meet helped us out and great to talk with. Jeep Warriors will be back.

Glasshouse Mountains caravan and camping park 🏕is a great little park,very reasonably priced. The toilet block is kept extremely clean!😁 They have several communal fire pits🔥 around the park, which are lit most nights,weather permitting of course!😉 The park is kept very neat and tidy and is  "no trace left behind" meaning you take your rubbish with you to dispose of correctly. Both the owner (Steve)and manager(Ian) are friendly and excellent 👌 👏 They made sure our stay was awesome and safe! 😁🤗The park is situated on a tree🌴🌳 lined creek,has a beautiful dam,complete with lilly pads and ducks🦆.  The park even has a beautiful view of Mt Tibrogagan⛰️ 😍 The Cobb and Co coach house museum out the front is very much worth checking out! The owner,Steve has such a passion and love❤️ for the coaches and he builds and restores coaches. He has vast knowledge on the coaches and their history which he excitedly shares😁🤩 There is only one negative I can say about the whole place and that is the quarry accross the road which can be quite noisy during the daylight hours. I definitely want to go back and spend more time there! 😁 Definitely recommend!

Absolutely breathtaking views of the mountains, beautiful maintained gardens. Just needs a few small details like park bins and working washing machine. A bit pricey if there is  than 1-2 people staying per nightstaying

Pauline was great and gave us a choice to choose our location as we are off-grid.
We didn't need any facilities, so the park was fine for us.
If you're looking for kitchen and dumping points, then this isn't your park.  It only has bathroom facilities and of course electricity and water.

We found $20 per person per night is a bit over compared to many other parks we stayed.

This is a great basic campsite in a great location in the middle of the glasshouse mountains. Don't expect 'tourist park' facilities, its a good country campsite with hot showers and toilets kept clean (hence 4 stars to moderate your expectations!).

Lovely views across to Mt Tibrogargan, easy access  to all of the mountains, beautiful night skies!
If you get a chance to talk to the owner Steve he deserves 5 stars on his own...absolute legend to spend some time with having a yarn. Some real passion projects going on!

Good location for exploring Glass house Mountains. The lady at reception was friendly. The toilets and showers were clean but not very nice. There was no drinking water nearby. Electrical tower next to site. Grass site was ok but not a glamorous setting.

The price is not what they tell you over the phone, they chuck extra hidden fees on top. It’s quite expensive considering it’s basically someone’s back yard. Power kept tripping, never happened anywhere else we’ve stayed. Driveway has big trenches in it causing your vehicle/trailer to bottom out if you’re not aware. No reception. Drinking water has to be collected from a tap. Amenities were clean though.

Super cute little campground. The hosts were amazing and helped us out so much (as the water pump of our rental rv was broken). We were only going to stay 1 night (and that night we had the campground all to ourselves!) but our plans changed and we decided to stay with them for another night and it all wasn’t a problem at all. Big shout out to that couple!

This is a nice tucked away campsite. Lovely staff with helpful and clear instructions. Entrance is off Mount Beerwah Rd at the NBN sign. It has a nice clean shower and toilet block with a coin operated washing machine. Nice large communal firepit shame it rained the whole time we were there. But the kids loved running around on the grass.
I was considering a powered site for a caravan BUT after my enquiry resulted in $70 A NIGHT for 2 people for a 7 night stay I declined as this price is appalling!!
Very lovely area, lovely staff who showed us around, clean and tidy, maintained powered sites. Will come back here again!

Hallo,
hier war der erste Campingplatz in Australien, auf dem das erste mal zu Gast war 1995. Ein toller Ort in Sichtweite der Glasshouse Mountains. War echt super angenehm. Einfaches einchecken abends, das wir morgens nachholen konnten. Guter nicht so großer Platz mit allem, was man brauchte, saubere Toiletten und Waschräume, ein Grillplatz und ein kleiner Shop am Eingang. War schön ruhig auf dem Platz aber Abends sehr gesellig. Haben freundliche Gäste kennen gelernt und viel Spaß mit Bier und Grillgut gehabt. War ein entspanntes Wochenende damals. Hoffe das der Campground noch ne Weile existiert. Vielen dank für das Erlebnis.
